Railroad Worker Obi:
You can get various rewards for destroying Mighty Chaos Golem. But only if your contribution to his defeat is high enough.
The total amount of damage you deal to the monster should be equal to at least 0.1% of his Max HP. The contribution reward is given out to 200 warriors that dealt the most damage.
Those who meet the requirements for the total amount of dealt damage can also claim additional rewards.
For example, a special prize is awarded to the warrior who located Mighty Chaos Golem and dealt the first hit as well as the one who delivered the final blow. the three characters who dealt the most damage will also receive special rewards.
